calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Apr-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Lazar, via ZOOM, for Paul Bruno, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court queries Mr. Lazar if there is nothing pending before this court. Mr. Lazar confirms the preceding. The court advises Mr. Lazar that the motion to be relieved will likely be granted subject to the review of the proposed order.

This matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.
